species: Approval for this research was obtained from the Ethics Committees of Jiangsu Province Hospital...
tissue: Breast cancer is the main cause of cancer-related deaths in women.
cell_type: We assessed the effects of TRPC5OS on proliferation and cell cycle progression in breast cancer cells...
disease_state: TRPC5OS might be an independent prognostic marker and potential therapeutic target for breast cancer patients.
sample_source: mammary tumor and adjacent normal tissues
Mammary tumor and adjacent normal tissues were acquired from Jiangsu Province Hospital...
age: Balb/c nude mice (female, 3–4 weeks old) were bought from the Model Animal Research Center...
anatomic_site_tumor: SUM-1315/TRPC5OS, SUM-1315/LV5, SUM-1315/193, and SUM-1315/LV3 cells respectively (2×106 cells in 0.1 mL PBS per mouse) were injected into the left side of the second pair of mammary gland fat pads...
cell_line: TRPC5OS highly expresses both in breast tumors and cell lines, and might be an independent prognostic marker for breast cancer patients.
sex: Balb/c nude mice (female, 3–4 weeks old) were bought from the Model Animal Research Center...
